Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Results about Filters *)
(** Author: Catherine LELAY. Jan 2016 - *)
(** Based on Bourbaky *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Preamble.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Export UniMath.Topology.Prelim.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

(** ** Definition of a Filter *)

Section Filter_def.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (F : (X → hProp) → hProp).

Definition isfilter_imply :=
  ∏ A B : X → hProp, (∏ x : X, A x → B x) → F A → F B.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_imply


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_imply

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A: X → hProp
isaprop
  (∏ B : X → hProp, (∏ x : X, A x → B x) → F A → F B)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop ((∏ x : X, A x → B x) → F A → F B)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (F A → F B)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (F B)

  apply propproperty.
Qed.

Definition isfilter_finite_intersection :=
  ∏ (L : Sequence (X → hProp)), (∏ n, F (L n)) → F (finite_intersection L).

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_finite_intersection


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_finite_intersection

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
isaprop
  ((∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L n))
   → F (finite_intersection L))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
isaprop (F (finite_intersection L))

  apply propproperty.
Qed.

Definition isfilter_htrue : hProp :=
  F (λ _ : X, htrue).

Definition isfilter_and :=
  ∏ A B : X → hProp, F A → F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x).

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_and


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_and

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A: X → hProp
isaprop
  (∏ B : X → hProp, F A → F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (F A → F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  apply propproperty.
Qed.

Definition isfilter_notempty :=
  ∏ A : X → hProp, F A → ∃ x : X, A x.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_notempty


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isfilter_notempty

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A: X → hProp
isaprop (F A → ∃ x : X, A x)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
A: X → hProp
isaprop (∃ x : X, A x)

  apply propproperty.
Qed.


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isfilter_finite_intersection → isfilter_htrue


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isfilter_finite_intersection → isfilter_htrue

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
isfilter_htrue

Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
F (λ _ : X, htrue)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
F (finite_intersection nil)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
∏ n : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, F (nil n)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
m: (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn
F (nil m)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
m: (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn
∅

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
m: (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn
pr1 m < length nil → ∅

  now apply negnatlthn0.
Qed.


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
isfilter_finite_intersection → isfilter_and

Fa: F A
Fb: F B
F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection
A, B: X → hProp
Fa: F A
Fb: F B
F (finite_intersection (pairSequence A B))

F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isfilter_finite_intersection

Fb: F B

F (pairSequence A B n)

F (pairSequence A B m)

Hm: m < length (pairSequence A B)
F (pairSequence A B (m,, Hm))

 exact Fb.
Qed.

→ isfilter_and → isfilter_finite_intersection

→ isfilter_and → isfilter_finite_intersection

F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isfilter_htrue
Hand: isfilter_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L n))
→ F (finite_intersection L)

Hand: isfilter_and

× (∏ A B : X → hProp,
   F A → F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

F: (X → hProp) → hProp

Hand: isfilter_and

F (λ _ : X, htrue)
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isfilter_htrue
Hand: isfilter_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
∏ A B : X → hProp, F A → F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isfilter_htrue
Hand: isfilter_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
F (λ _ : X, htrue)
 exact Htrue.
  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isfilter_htrue
Hand: isfilter_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
∏ A B : X → hProp, F A → F B → F (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)
 exact Hand.
Qed.

End Filter_def.

Definition isPreFilter {X : UU} (F : (X → hProp) → hProp) :=
  isfilter_imply F × isfilter_finite_intersection F.
Definition PreFilter (X : UU) :=
  ∑ (F : (X → hProp) → hProp), isPreFilter F.
Definition make_PreFilter {X : UU} (F : (X → hProp) → hProp)
           (Himpl : isfilter_imply F)
           (Htrue : isfilter_htrue F)
           (Hand : isfilter_and F) : PreFilter X :=
  F,, Himpl,, isfilter_finite_intersection_carac F Htrue Hand.

Definition pr1PreFilter (X : UU) (F : PreFilter X) : (X → hProp) → hProp := pr1 F.
Coercion pr1PreFilter : PreFilter >-> Funclass.

Definition isFilter {X : UU} (F : (X → hProp) → hProp) :=
  isPreFilter F × isfilter_notempty F.
Definition Filter (X : UU) := ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, isFilter F.
Definition pr1Filter (X : UU) (F : Filter X) : PreFilter X :=
  pr1 F,, pr1 (pr2 F).
Coercion pr1Filter : Filter >-> PreFilter.
Definition make_Filter {X : UU} (F : (X → hProp) → hProp)
           (Himp : isfilter_imply F)
           (Htrue : isfilter_htrue F)
           (Hand : isfilter_and F)
           (Hempty : isfilter_notempty F) : Filter X :=
  F ,, (Himp ,, (isfilter_finite_intersection_carac F Htrue Hand)) ,, Hempty.


∏ F : (∅ → hProp) → hProp, ¬ isFilter F


∏ F : (∅ → hProp) → hProp, ¬ isFilter F

  
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
∅

  
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
∅

  
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
(∃ _ : ∅, htrue) → ∅

  
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
isaprop ∅
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
(∑ _ : ∅, htrue) → ∅

  
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
isaprop ∅
 apply isapropempty.
  
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
(∑ _ : ∅, htrue) → ∅
 
F: (∅ → hProp) → hProp
Hf: isFilter F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
x: ∑ _ : ∅, htrue
∅

    apply (pr1 x).
Qed.

Section PreFilter_pty.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (F : PreFilter X).


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_imply F


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_imply F

  exact (pr1 (pr2 F)).
Qed.

X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_finite_intersection F


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_finite_intersection F

  exact (pr2 (pr2 F)).
Qed.

X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_htrue F


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_htrue F

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_finite_intersection F

  exact filter_finite_intersection.
Qed.

X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_and F


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_and F

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_finite_intersection F

  exact filter_finite_intersection.
Qed.


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
∏ A : X → hProp, (∏ x : X, A x) → F A


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
∏ A : X → hProp, (∏ x : X, A x) → F A

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
A: X → hProp
Ha: ∏ x : X, A x
F A

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
A: X → hProp
Ha: ∏ x : X, A x
isfilter_htrue F → F A

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
A: X → hProp
Ha: ∏ x : X, A x
∏ x : X, htrue → A x

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
A: X → hProp
Ha: ∏ x : X, A x
x: X
A x

  now apply Ha.
Qed.

End PreFilter_pty.

Context {X : UU}.

X: UU
F: Filter X
isfilter_notempty F

F: Filter X
isfilter_notempty F

  exact (pr2 (pr2 F)).
Qed.

(** *** Order on filters *)

Definition filter_le {X : UU} (F G : PreFilter X) :=
  ∏ A : X → hProp, G A → F A.


X: UU
∏ F G H : PreFilter X,
filter_le F G → filter_le G H → filter_le F H


X: UU
∏ F G H : PreFilter X,
filter_le F G → filter_le G H → filter_le F H

  
X: UU
F, G, H: PreFilter X
Hfg: filter_le F G
Hgh: filter_le G H
A: X → hProp
Fa: H A
F A

  apply Hfg, Hgh, Fa.
Qed.

X: UU
∏ F : PreFilter X, filter_le F F


X: UU
∏ F : PreFilter X, filter_le F F

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
A: X → hProp
Fa: F A
F A

  exact Fa.
Qed.

∏ F G : PreFilter X,
filter_le F G → filter_le G F → F = G

∏ F G : PreFilter X,
filter_le F G → filter_le G F → F = G

F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
F = G

Hle: filter_le F G

isaprop
  (∑ _ : isfilter_imply y,
   isfilter_finite_intersection y)

Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
pr1 F = pr1 G

   isfilter_finite_intersection y)

F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
pr1 F = pr1 G
 
X: UU
F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
pr1 F A = pr1 G A

    
X: UU
F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
pr1 F A → pr1 G A
X: UU
F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
pr1 G A → pr1 F A

    
X: UU
F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
pr1 F A → pr1 G A
 now apply Hge.
    
X: UU
F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
Hge: filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
pr1 G A → pr1 F A
 now apply Hle.
Qed.

 apply (filter_le F G).
    
X: UU
F, G: make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)
isaprop (filter_le F G)
 
X: UU
F, G: make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)
A: X → hProp
isaprop (G A → F A)

      
X: UU
F, G: make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)
A: X → hProp
isaprop (F A)

      apply propproperty.
  
X: UU
isPartialOrder
  ((λ F
       G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
    make_hProp (filter_le F G)
      (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
         (λ A : X → hProp,
          isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))
   :
   hrel (make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)))
 
X: UU
istrans
  (λ F G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
   make_hProp (filter_le F G)
     (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
        (λ A : X → hProp,
         isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))
X: UU
isrefl
  (λ F G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
   make_hProp (filter_le F G)
     (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
        (λ A : X → hProp,
         isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))
X: UU
isantisymm
  (λ F G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
   make_hProp (filter_le F G)
     (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
        (λ A : X → hProp,
         isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))

    
X: UU
istrans
  (λ F G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
   make_hProp (filter_le F G)
     (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
        (λ A : X → hProp,
         isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))
 
X: UU
F, G, H: make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)
filter_le F G → filter_le G H → filter_le F H

      apply istrans_filter_le.
    
X: UU
isrefl
  (λ F G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
   make_hProp (filter_le F G)
     (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
        (λ A : X → hProp,
         isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))
 
X: UU
A: make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)
filter_le A A

      apply isrefl_filter_le.
    
X: UU
isantisymm
  (λ F G : make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X),
   make_hProp (filter_le F G)
     (impred_isaprop (λ t : X → hProp, G t → F t)
        (λ A : X → hProp,
         isapropimpl (G A) (F A) (propproperty (F A)))))
 
X: UU
F, G: make_hSet (PreFilter X) (isasetPreFilter X)
filter_le F G → filter_le G F → F = G

      apply isantisymm_filter_le.
Defined.

(** *** Image of a filter *)

Section filterim.

Context {X Y : UU}.
Context (f : X → Y) (F : (X → hProp) → hProp).
Context (Himp : isfilter_imply F)
        (Htrue : isfilter_htrue F)
        (Hand : isfilter_and F)
        (Hempty : isfilter_notempty F).

Definition filterim :=
  λ A : (Y → hProp), F (λ x : X, A (f x)).


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_imply filterim


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_imply filterim

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A, B: Y → hProp
H: ∏ x : Y, A x → B x
filterim A → filterim B

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A, B: Y → hProp
H: ∏ x : Y, A x → B x
∏ x : X, A (f x) → B (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A, B: Y → hProp
H: ∏ x : Y, A x → B x
x: X
A (f x) → B (f x)

  apply H.
Qed.

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_htrue filterim


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_htrue filterim

  apply Htrue.
Qed.

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_and filterim


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_and filterim

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A, B: Y → hProp
filterim A
→ filterim B → filterim (λ x : Y, A x ∧ B x)

  apply Hand.
Qed.

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_notempty filterim


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
isfilter_notempty filterim

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A: Y → hProp
Fa: filterim A
∃ x : Y, A x

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A: Y → hProp
Fa: filterim A
(∃ x : X, A (f x)) → ∃ x : Y, A x

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A: Y → hProp
Fa: filterim A
(∑ x : X, A (f x)) → ∑ x : Y, A x

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A: Y → hProp
Fa: filterim A
x: ∑ x : X, A (f x)
∑ x : Y, A x

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
A: Y → hProp
Fa: filterim A
x: ∑ x : X, A (f x)
A (f (pr1 x))

  exact (pr2 x).
Qed.

End filterim.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
PreFilter Y


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
PreFilter Y

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
(Y → hProp) → hProp
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_imply ?F
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_htrue ?F
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_and ?F

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
(Y → hProp) → hProp
 exact (filterim f F).
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_imply (filterim f F)
 apply filterim_imply, filter_imply.
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_htrue (filterim f F)
 apply filterim_htrue, filter_htrue.
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
isfilter_and (filterim f F)
 apply filterim_and, filter_and.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
Filter Y


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
Filter Y

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
isFilter ?Goal

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
isPreFilter ?Goal
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
isfilter_notempty ?Goal

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
isPreFilter ?Goal
 apply (pr2 (PreFilterIm f F)).
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: Filter X
isfilter_notempty (pr1 (PreFilterIm f F))
 apply filterim_notempty, filter_notempty.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F G : PreFilter X),
filter_le F G
→ filter_le (PreFilterIm f F) (PreFilterIm f G)


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F G : PreFilter X),
filter_le F G
→ filter_le (PreFilterIm f F) (PreFilterIm f G)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F, G: PreFilter X
Hle: filter_le F G
A: Y → hProp
filterim f G A → filterim f F A

  apply Hle.
Qed.

X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F G : Filter X),
filter_le F G
→ filter_le (FilterIm f F) (FilterIm f G)


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F G : Filter X),
filter_le F G
→ filter_le (FilterIm f F) (FilterIm f G)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F, G: Filter X
Hle: filter_le F G
A: Y → hProp
filterim f (pr1 G) A → filterim f (pr1 F) A

  apply Hle.
Qed.

(** *** Limit: filter version *)

Definition filterlim {X Y : UU} (f : X → Y) (F : PreFilter X) (G : PreFilter Y) :=
  filter_le (PreFilterIm f F) G.


X, Y, Z: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (g : Y → Z) (F : PreFilter X)
(G : PreFilter Y) (H : PreFilter Z),
filterlim f F G
→ filterlim g G H → filterlim (g ∘ f) F H


X, Y, Z: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (g : Y → Z) (F : PreFilter X)
(G : PreFilter Y) (H : PreFilter Z),
filterlim f F G
→ filterlim g G H → filterlim (g ∘ f) F H

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
F: PreFilter X
G: PreFilter Y
H: PreFilter Z
Hf: filterlim f F G
Hg: filterlim g G H
A: Z → hProp
Fa: H A
PreFilterIm (g ∘ f) F A

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
F: PreFilter X
G: PreFilter Y
H: PreFilter Z
Hf: filterlim f F G
A: Z → hProp
Hg: PreFilterIm g G A
Fa: H A
PreFilterIm (g ∘ f) F A

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
F: PreFilter X
G: PreFilter Y
H: PreFilter Z
A: Z → hProp
Hf: PreFilterIm f F (λ x : Y, A (g x))
Hg: PreFilterIm g G A
Fa: H A
PreFilterIm (g ∘ f) F A

  apply Hf.
Qed.


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F F' : PreFilter X) (G : PreFilter Y),
filter_le F' F → filterlim f F G → filterlim f F' G


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F F' : PreFilter X) (G : PreFilter Y),
filter_le F' F → filterlim f F G → filterlim f F' G

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F, F': PreFilter X
G: PreFilter Y
Hf: filter_le F' F
Hle: filterlim f F G
A: Y → hProp
Ha: G A
PreFilterIm f F' A

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F, F': PreFilter X
G: PreFilter Y
Hf: filter_le F' F
A: Y → hProp
Hle: PreFilterIm f F A
Ha: G A
PreFilterIm f F' A

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F, F': PreFilter X
G: PreFilter Y
A: Y → hProp
Hf: F' (λ x : X, A (f x))
Hle: PreFilterIm f F A
Ha: G A
PreFilterIm f F' A

  apply Hf.
Qed.


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F : PreFilter X) (G G' : PreFilter Y),
filter_le G G' → filterlim f F G → filterlim f F G'


X, Y: UU
∏ (f : X → Y) (F : PreFilter X) (G G' : PreFilter Y),
filter_le G G' → filterlim f F G → filterlim f F G'

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
G, G': PreFilter Y
Hg: filter_le G G'
Hle: filterlim f F G
A: Y → hProp
Ha: G' A
PreFilterIm f F A

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
G, G': PreFilter Y
A: Y → hProp
Hg: G A
Hle: filterlim f F G
Ha: G' A
PreFilterIm f F A

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
F: PreFilter X
G, G': PreFilter Y
A: Y → hProp
Hg: G A
Hle: PreFilterIm f F A
Ha: G' A
PreFilterIm f F A

  exact Hle.
Qed.

(** ** Some usefull filters *)

(** *** Filter on a domain *)

Section filterdom.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (F : (X → hProp) → hProp)
        (Himp : isfilter_imply F)
        (Htrue : isfilter_htrue F)
        (Hand : isfilter_and F)
        (Hempty : isfilter_notempty F).
Context (dom : X → hProp)
        (Hdom : ∏ P, F P → ∃ x, dom x ∧ P x).

Definition filterdom : (X → hProp) → hProp
  := λ A : X → hProp, F (λ x : X, make_hProp (dom x → A x) (isapropimpl _ _ (propproperty _))).


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_imply filterdom


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_imply filterdom

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
filterdom A → filterdom B

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
∏ x : X,
make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
→ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (B x))
       (propproperty (B x)))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
x: X
Ax: make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
Hx: dom x
B x

  apply Himpl, Ax, Hx.
Qed.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_htrue filterdom


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_htrue filterdom

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
∏ x : X,
htrue
→ make_hProp (dom x → htrue)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 htrue)
       (propproperty htrue))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
x: X
H: htrue
htrue

  exact H.
Qed.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_and filterdom


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_and filterdom

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
filterdom (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
F
  (λ x : X,
   make_hProp (dom x → A x)
     (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
        (propproperty (A x)))
   ∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
       (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (B x))
          (propproperty (B x))))
→ filterdom (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
∏ x : X,
make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (B x))
       (propproperty (B x)))
→ make_hProp (dom x → A x ∧ B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x ∧ B x))
       (propproperty (A x ∧ B x)))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (B x)) (propproperty (B x)))
Hx: dom x
A x ∧ B x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (B x)) (propproperty (B x)))
Hx: dom x
A x
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (B x)) (propproperty (B x)))
Hx: dom x
B x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (B x)) (propproperty (B x)))
Hx: dom x
A x
 apply (pr1 ABx), Hx.
  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: filterdom A
Hb: filterdom B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (dom x → A x)
  (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
     (propproperty (A x)))
∧ make_hProp (dom x → B x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (B x)) (propproperty (B x)))
Hx: dom x
B x
 apply (pr2 ABx), Hx.
Qed.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_notempty filterdom


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_notempty filterdom

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_notempty filterdom

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterdom A
∃ x : X, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterdom A
(∃ x : X,
 dom x
 ∧ make_hProp (dom x → A x)
     (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
        (propproperty (A x)))) → ∃ x : X, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterdom A
(∑ x : X,
 dom x
 ∧ make_hProp (dom x → A x)
     (isapropimpl (dom x) (pr1 (A x))
        (propproperty (A x)))) → ∑ x : X, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterdom A
x: ∑ x : X,
dom x
∧ make_hProp (dom x → A x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (A x)) (propproperty (A x)))
∑ x : X, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterdom A
x: ∑ x : X,
dom x
∧ make_hProp (dom x → A x)
    (isapropimpl (dom x) 
       (pr1 (A x)) (propproperty (A x)))
A (pr1 x)

  apply (pr2 (pr2 x)), (pr1 (pr2 x)).
Qed.

End filterdom.


X: UU

dom: X → hProp
PreFilter X

 exact (filterdom F dom).

dom: X → hProp

 apply (pr2 (PreFilterDom F dom)).
  
X: UU
F: Filter X
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_notempty (pr1 (PreFilterDom F dom))
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x

    exact Hdom.
Defined.

(** *** Filter on a subtype *)

Section filtersubtype.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (F : (X → hProp) → hProp)
        (Himp : isfilter_imply F)
        (Htrue : isfilter_htrue F)
        (Hand : isfilter_and F)
        (Hempty : isfilter_notempty F).
Context (dom : X → hProp)
        (Hdom : ∏ P, F P → ∃ x, dom x ∧ P x).

Definition filtersubtype : ((∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ A : (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp,
        F (λ x : X, make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx)) (impred_isaprop _ (λ _, propproperty _))).


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_imply filtersubtype


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_imply filtersubtype

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x → B x
filtersubtype A → filtersubtype B

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x → B x
∏ x : X,
make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
→ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x → B x
x: X
Ax: make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
Hx: dom x
B (x,, Hx)

  apply Himpl, Ax.
Qed.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_htrue filtersubtype


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_htrue filtersubtype

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
∏ x : X,
htrue
→ make_hProp (dom x → htrue)
    (impred_isaprop (λ _ : dom x, pr1 htrue)
       (λ _ : dom x, propproperty htrue))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
x: X
H: htrue
htrue

  exact H.
Qed.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_and filtersubtype


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_and filtersubtype

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
filtersubtype (λ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
F
  (λ x : X,
   make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
     (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
        (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
   ∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
       (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
          (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t)))))
→ filtersubtype (λ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
∏ x : X,
make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))
→ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx) ∧ B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop
       (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H) ∧ B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x,
        propproperty (A (x,, t) ∧ B (x,, t))))

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop
       (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))
Hx: dom x
A (x,, Hx) ∧ B (x,, Hx)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop
       (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))
Hx: dom x
A (x,, Hx)
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop
       (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))
Hx: dom x
B (x,, Hx)

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop
       (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))
Hx: dom x
A (x,, Hx)
 apply (pr1 ABx).
  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A, B: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Ha: filtersubtype A
Hb: filtersubtype B
x: X
ABx: make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
  (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
     (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, B (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop
       (λ H : dom x, pr1 (B (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (B (x,, t))))
Hx: dom x
B (x,, Hx)
 apply (pr2 ABx).
Qed.

X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_notempty filtersubtype


X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
isfilter_notempty filtersubtype

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Fa: filtersubtype A
∃ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Fa: filtersubtype A
(∃ x : X,
 dom x
 ∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
     (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
        (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t)))))
→ ∃ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Fa: filtersubtype A
(∑ x : X,
 dom x
 ∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
     (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
        (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t)))))
→ ∑ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Fa: filtersubtype A
x: ∑ x : X,
dom x
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
∑ x : ∑ x : X, dom x, A x

  
X: UU
F: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp: isfilter_imply F
Htrue: isfilter_htrue F
Hand: isfilter_and F
Hempty: isfilter_notempty F
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
A: (∑ x : X, dom x) → hProp
Fa: filtersubtype A
x: ∑ x : X,
dom x
∧ make_hProp (∏ Hx : dom x, A (x,, Hx))
    (impred_isaprop (λ H : dom x, pr1 (A (x,, H)))
       (λ t : dom x, propproperty (A (x,, t))))
A (pr1 x,, pr1 (pr2 x))

  exact (pr2 (pr2 x) (pr1 (pr2 x))).
Qed.

End filtersubtype.


X: UU
F: PreFilter X
dom: X → hProp
PreFilter (∑ x : X, dom x)

dom: X → hProp

X: UU
F: Filter X
dom: X → hProp
Hdom: ∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x
∏ P : X → hProp, F P → ∃ x : X, dom x ∧ P x

    exact Hdom.
Defined.

(** *** Direct Product of filters *)

Section filterdirprod.

Context {X Y : UU}.
Context (Fx : (X → hProp) → hProp)
        (Himp_x : isfilter_imply Fx)
        (Htrue_x : isfilter_htrue Fx)
        (Hand_x : isfilter_and Fx)
        (Hempty_x : isfilter_notempty Fx).
Context (Fy : (Y → hProp) → hProp)
        (Himp_y : isfilter_imply Fy)
        (Htrue_y : isfilter_htrue Fy)
        (Hand_y : isfilter_and Fy)
        (Hempty_y : isfilter_notempty Fy).

Definition filterdirprod : (X × Y → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ A : (X × Y) → hProp,
        ∃ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
          Fx Ax × Fy Ay × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,,y)).


X, Y: UU
Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
isfilter_imply filterdirprod

Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
isfilter_imply filterdirprod

Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A, B: X × Y → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X × Y, A x → B x
filterdirprod A → filterdirprod B

Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx

Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A, B: X × Y → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X × Y, A x → B x
(∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
 Fx Ax
 × Fy Ay
   × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ ∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
  Fx Ax
  × Fy Ay
    × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))

Fx Ax
× Fy Ay
  × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
Fx Ax
× Fy Ay × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))

Fx Ax
× Fy Ay × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))

Fx Ax
 exact Fax.

 exact Fay.

Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
x: X
y: Y
Hx: Ax x
Hy: Ay y
B (x,, y)

    now apply Himpl, Ha.
Qed.

isfilter_htrue filterdirprod

Fx Ax
× Fy Ay × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → htrue)

 apply Htrue_y.

A, B: X × Y → hProp
filterdirprod A
→ filterdirprod B
  → filterdirprod (λ x : X × Y, A x ∧ B x)

Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx

A, B: X × Y → hProp
(∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
 Fx Ax
 × Fy Ay
   × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ (∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
   Fx Ax
   × Fy Ay
     × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y)))
  → ∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
    Fx Ax
    × Fy Ay
      × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y),
         Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y) ∧ B (x,, y))

Fx Ax

Fx Ax
× Fy Ay
  × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))

X, Y: UU
Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A, B: X × Y → hProp
Ax: X → hProp
Ay: Y → hProp
Fax: Fx Ax
Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
Bx: X → hProp
By: Y → hProp
Fbx: Fx Bx
Fby: Fy By
Hb: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Bx x → By y → B (x,, y)
∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
Fx Ax
× Fy Ay
  × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y),
     Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y) ∧ B (x,, y))

  
X, Y: UU
Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A, B: X × Y → hProp
Ax: X → hProp
Ay: Y → hProp
Fax: Fx Ax
Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
Bx: X → hProp
By: Y → hProp
Fbx: Fx Bx
Fby: Fy By
Hb: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Bx x → By y → B (x,, y)
Fx (λ x : X, Ax x ∧ Bx x)
× Fy (λ y : Y, Ay y ∧ By y)
  × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y),
     Ax x ∧ Bx x → Ay y ∧ By y → A (x,, y) ∧ B (x,, y))

Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx

Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy

Ay: Y → hProp
Fax: Fx Ax
Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
Bx: X → hProp
By: Y → hProp
Fbx: Fx Bx
Fby: Fy By
Hb: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Bx x → By y → B (x,, y)
Fx (λ x : X, Ax x ∧ Bx x)

Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx

By: Y → hProp
Fbx: Fx Bx
Fby: Fy By
Hb: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Bx x → By y → B (x,, y)
x: X
y: Y
X0: Ax x ∧ Bx x
X1: Ay y ∧ By y
By y
 apply (pr2 X1).
Qed.

isfilter_notempty filterdirprod

filterdirprod A → ∃ x : X × Y, A x

(∑ (Ax : X → hProp) (Ay : Y → hProp),
 Fx Ax
 × Fy Ay
   × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ ∃ x : X × Y, A x

Fx Ax
× Fy Ay
  × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
∃ x : X × Y, A x

Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
x: ∑ x : X, Ax x
y: ∑ x : Y, Ay x
Ax (pr1 x)
X, Y: UU
Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A: X × Y → hProp
Ax: X → hProp
Ay: Y → hProp
Fax: Fx Ax
Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
x: ∑ x : X, Ax x
y: ∑ x : Y, Ay x
Ay (pr1 y)

  
X, Y: UU
Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A: X × Y → hProp
Ax: X → hProp
Ay: Y → hProp
Fax: Fx Ax
Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
x: ∑ x : X, Ax x
y: ∑ x : Y, Ay x
Ax (pr1 x)
 exact (pr2 x).
  
X, Y: UU
Fx: (X → hProp) → hProp
Himp_x: isfilter_imply Fx
Htrue_x: isfilter_htrue Fx
Hand_x: isfilter_and Fx
Hempty_x: isfilter_notempty Fx
Fy: (Y → hProp) → hProp
Himp_y: isfilter_imply Fy
Htrue_y: isfilter_htrue Fy
Hand_y: isfilter_and Fy
Hempty_y: isfilter_notempty Fy
A: X × Y → hProp
Ax: X → hProp
Ay: Y → hProp
Fax: Fx Ax
Fay: Fy Ay
Ha: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)
x: ∑ x : X, Ax x
y: ∑ x : Y, Ay x
Ay (pr1 y)
 exact (pr2 y).
Qed.

End filterdirprod.

Defined.

Definition PreFilterPr1 {X Y : UU} (F : PreFilter (X × Y)) : PreFilter X :=
  (PreFilterIm pr1 F).
Definition FilterPr1 {X Y : UU} (F : Filter (X × Y)) : Filter X :=
  (FilterIm pr1 F).

Definition PreFilterPr2 {X Y : UU} (F : PreFilter (X × Y)) : PreFilter Y :=
  (PreFilterIm (@pr2 X (λ _ : X, Y)) F).
Definition FilterPr2 {X Y : UU} (F : Filter (X × Y)) : Filter Y :=
  (FilterIm (@pr2 X (λ _ : X, Y)) F).


∏ (X Y : UU) (F : PreFilter (X × Y)),
filter_le F
  (PreFilterDirprod (PreFilterPr1 F) (PreFilterPr2 F))

filter_le F
  (PreFilterDirprod (PreFilterPr1 F) (PreFilterPr2 F))

F: PreFilter (X × Y)

F: PreFilter (X × Y)
A: X × Y → hProp
PreFilterDirprod (PreFilterPr1 F) (PreFilterPr2 F) A
→ F A

   × (∏ (x : X) (y : Y), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ F A

(** ** Other filters *)

(** *** Filter on nat *)

Section filternat.

Definition filternat : (nat → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ P : nat → hProp, ∃ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → P n.


isfilter_imply filternat


isfilter_imply filternat

  
P, Q: nat → hProp
H: ∏ x : nat, P x → Q x
filternat P → filternat Q

  
P, Q: nat → hProp
H: ∏ x : nat, P x → Q x
(∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → P n)
→ ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → Q n

  
P, Q: nat → hProp
H: ∏ x : nat, P x → Q x
N: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → P n
∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → Q n

  
P, Q: nat → hProp
H: ∏ x : nat, P x → Q x
N: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → P n
∏ n : nat, pr1 N ≤ n → Q n

  
P, Q: nat → hProp
H: ∏ x : nat, P x → Q x
N: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → P n
n: nat
Hn: pr1 N ≤ n
Q n

  now apply H, (pr2 N).
Qed.

isfilter_htrue filternat


isfilter_htrue filternat

  
∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → htrue

  now exists O.
Qed.

isfilter_and filternat


isfilter_and filternat

  
A, B: nat → hProp
filternat A
→ filternat B → filternat (λ x : nat, A x ∧ B x)

  
A, B: nat → hProp
(∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n)
→ (∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n)
  → ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n ∧ B n

  
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n ∧ B n

  
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
∏ n : nat, max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n → A n ∧ B n

Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
A n ∧ B n

  
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
A n
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
B n

  
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
A n
 
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
pr1 Na ≤ n

    
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
pr1 Na ≤ max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb)

    now apply max_le_l.
  
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
B n
 
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
pr1 Nb ≤ n

    
A, B: nat → hProp
Na: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
Nb: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → B n
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb) ≤ n
pr1 Nb ≤ max (pr1 Na) (pr1 Nb)

    now apply max_le_r.
Qed.

isfilter_notempty filternat


isfilter_notempty filternat

  
A: nat → hProp
filternat A → ∃ x : nat, A x

  
A: nat → hProp
(∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n) → ∑ x : nat, A x

  
A: nat → hProp
N: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
∑ x : nat, A x

  
A: nat → hProp
N: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
A (pr1 N)

  
A: nat → hProp
N: ∑ N : nat, ∏ n : nat, N ≤ n → A n
pr1 N ≤ pr1 N

  now apply isreflnatleh.
Qed.

End filternat.


Filter nat


Filter nat

  
(nat → hProp) → hProp
isfilter_imply ?F
isfilter_htrue ?F
isfilter_and ?F
isfilter_notempty ?F

  
(nat → hProp) → hProp
 apply filternat.
  
isfilter_imply filternat
 apply filternat_imply.
  
isfilter_htrue filternat
 apply filternat_htrue.
  
isfilter_and filternat
 apply filternat_and.
  
isfilter_notempty filternat
 apply filternat_notempty.
Defined.

(** *** The upper filter *)

Section filtertop.

Context  {X : UU} (x0 : ∥ X ∥).

Definition filtertop : (X → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ A : X → hProp, make_hProp (∏ x : X, A x) (impred_isaprop _ (λ _, propproperty _)).


X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isfilter_imply filtertop


X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isfilter_imply filtertop

x0: ∥ X ∥
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: filtertop A
x: X
B x

  
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: filtertop A
x: X
A x

  simple refine (Ha _).
Qed.

∑ x : X, A x

Qed.

End filtertop.

isfilter_and ?F

  
X: UU
(X → hProp) → hProp
 exact filtertop.
  
X: UU
isfilter_imply filtertop
 exact filtertop_imply.
  
X: UU
isfilter_htrue filtertop
 exact filtertop_htrue.
  
X: UU
isfilter_and filtertop
 exact filtertop_and.
Defined.


X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
Filter X


X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
Filter X

  
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isFilter ?Goal

  
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isPreFilter ?Goal
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isfilter_notempty ?Goal

  
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isPreFilter ?Goal
 apply (pr2 PreFilterTop).
  
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
isfilter_notempty (pr1 PreFilterTop)
 apply filtertop_notempty, x0.
Defined.


X: UU
∏ F : PreFilter X, filter_le F PreFilterTop


X: UU
∏ F : PreFilter X, filter_le F PreFilterTop

  
X: UU
F: PreFilter X
A: X → hProp
Ha: PreFilterTop A
F A

  apply filter_forall, Ha.
Qed.

X: UU
∏ (x0 : ∥ X ∥) (F : Filter X),
filter_le F (FilterTop x0)


X: UU
∏ (x0 : ∥ X ∥) (F : Filter X),
filter_le F (FilterTop x0)

  
X: UU
x0: ∥ X ∥
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
Ha: FilterTop x0 A
F A

  apply PreFilterTop_correct, Ha.
Qed.

(** *** Intersection of filters *)

Section filterintersection.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (is : ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU).
Context (FF : (∑ F : ((X → hProp) → hProp), is F) → hProp)
        (Himp : ∏ F, FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F))
        (Htrue : ∏ F, FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F))
        (Hand : ∏ F, FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F))
        (Hempty : ∏ F, FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)).
Context (His : ∃ F, FF F).

Definition filterintersection : (X → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ A : X → hProp, make_hProp (∏ F, FF F → (pr1 F) A)
                             (impred_isaprop _ (λ _, isapropimpl _ _ (propproperty _))).


X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU
FF: (∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F) → hProp
Himp: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F)
Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
His: ∃ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
isfilter_imply filterintersection


X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU
FF: (∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F) → hProp
Himp: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F)
Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
His: ∃ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
isfilter_imply filterintersection

  
X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU
FF: (∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F) → hProp
Himp: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F)
Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
His: ∃ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: filterintersection A
F: ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F
Hf: FF F
pr1 F B

  
X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU

FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
His: ∃ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: filterintersection A
F: ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F
Hf: FF F
∏ x : X, A x → B x

Ha: filterintersection A

Hf: FF F
∏ x : X, A x → B x
 apply H.

X: UU

Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,

His: ∃ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F

H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: filterintersection A

Hf: FF F
FF F

    exact Hf.
Qed.

X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU
FF: (∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F) → hProp
Himp: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F)
Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
His: ∃ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
F: ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F
Hf: FF F
pr1 F (λ _ : X, htrue)

  now apply (Htrue F).
Qed.

 now simple refine (Ha _ _).

Hb: filterintersection B

Hf: FF F
pr1 F B
 now simple refine (Hb _ _).
Qed.

Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterintersection A
F: ∑ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
FF (pr1 F)
 exact (pr2 F).
  
X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU
FF: (∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F) → hProp
Himp: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F)
Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterintersection A
F: ∑ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
pr1 (pr1 F) A
 
X: UU
is: ((X → hProp) → hProp) → UU
FF: (∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F) → hProp
Himp: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_imply (pr1 F)
Htrue: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_htrue (pr1 F)
Hand: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_and (pr1 F)
Hempty: ∏ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F,
FF F → isfilter_notempty (pr1 F)
A: X → hProp
Fa: filterintersection A
F: ∑ F : ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, is F, FF F
FF (pr1 F)

    exact (pr2 F).
Qed.

End filterintersection.

 exact Hff.

X: UU
FF: PreFilter X → hProp
(∏ F : PreFilter X,
 FF F → filter_le F (PreFilterIntersection FF))
× (∏ F : PreFilter X,
   (∏ G : PreFilter X, FF G → filter_le G F)
   → filter_le (PreFilterIntersection FF) F)

 FF F → filter_le F (PreFilterIntersection FF))

Hf: FF F

F A

    now simple refine (Ha _ _).

∏ F : PreFilter X,
(∏ G : PreFilter X, FF G → filter_le G F)
→ filter_le (PreFilterIntersection FF) F

FF: PreFilter X → hProp
F: PreFilter X
H: ∏ G : PreFilter X, FF G → filter_le G F
A: X → hProp

G: ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, isPreFilter F
Hg: FF G
pr1 G A

H: ∏ G : PreFilter X, FF G → filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
Fa: F A

Hg: FF G

    apply Fa.
Qed.

FF: Filter X → hProp
Hff: ∃ F : Filter X, FF F
F: Filter X
H: ∏ G : Filter X, FF G → filter_le G F
A: X → hProp
Fa: F A
G: ∑ F : (X → hProp) → hProp, isFilter F
Hg: FF G
F A

    apply Fa.
Qed.

(** *** Filter generated by a set of subsets *)

Section filtergenerated.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (L : (X → hProp) → hProp).
Context (Hl : ∏ (L' : Sequence (X → hProp)), (∏ m, L (L' m)) → ∃ x : X, ∏ m, L' m x).

Definition filtergenerated : (X → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ A : X → hProp,
        ∃ (L' : Sequence (X → hProp)), (∏ m, L (L' m)) × (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x).


X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
isfilter_imply filtergenerated


X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
isfilter_imply filtergenerated

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
filtergenerated A → filtergenerated B

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
∏ x : X, finite_intersection (pr1 Ha) x → B x

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
x: X
Hx: finite_intersection (pr1 Ha) x
B x

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
x: X
Hx: finite_intersection (pr1 Ha) x
A x

  apply (pr2 (pr2 Ha)), Hx.
Qed.

X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
isfilter_htrue filtergenerated


X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
isfilter_htrue filtergenerated

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → htrue)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
(∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, L (nil m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection nil x → htrue)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, L (nil m)
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
∏ x : X, finite_intersection nil x → htrue

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, L (nil m)
 
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
m: (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn
L (nil m)

    induction (nopathsfalsetotrue (pr2 m)).
  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
∏ x : X, finite_intersection nil x → htrue
 easy.
Qed.


X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
isfilter_and filtergenerated


X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
isfilter_and filtergenerated

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
filtergenerated A
→ filtergenerated B
  → filtergenerated (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
(∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
 (∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
 × (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x))
→ (∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
   (∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
   × (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x))
  → ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
    (∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
    × (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
(∏
 m : (⟦ length (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb)) ⟧)%stn,
 L (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb) m))
× (∏ x : X,
   finite_intersection (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb))
     x → A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
∏
m : (⟦ length (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb)) ⟧)%stn,
L (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb) m)
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
∏ x : X,
finite_intersection (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb)) x
→ A x ∧ B x

Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)

L (concatenate (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb) m)
 
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
m: (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) + length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn
L (concatenate' (pr1 Ha) (pr1 Hb) m)

    
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
m: (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) + length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn
L
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn
            ⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, X → hProp)
     (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Ha j)
     (λ k : (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Hb k)
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap (length (pr1 Ha))
        (length (pr1 Hb)) m))

    
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),

× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
m: (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) + length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn

  (length (pr1 Hb)) m: (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn
⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn

  (coprod_rect

     (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Ha j)
     (λ k : (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Hb k) Hm)

(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
x: X
m: (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn
Hx: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn
         ⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, X → hProp)
  (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Ha j)
  (λ k : (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Hb k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap (length (pr1 Ha))
     (length (pr1 Hb))
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (length (pr1 Ha))
        (length (pr1 Hb)) (inl m))) x
pr1 Ha m x

      
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
→ ∃ x : X, ∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L' m x
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)
Hb: ∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, L (L' m))
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
x: X
m: (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn
Hx: pr1 Ha m x
pr1 Ha m x

      exact Hx.
    
X: UU
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),

× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)
x: X
Hx: ∏
n : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) + length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn,
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn
         ⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, X → hProp)
  (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 Ha) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Ha j)
  (λ k : (⟦ length (pr1 Hb) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Hb k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap (length (pr1 Ha))
     (length (pr1 Hb)) n) x
B x

x: ∑ x : X,
∏ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L') ⟧)%stn, pr1 L' m x
finite_intersection (pr1 L') (pr1 x)

  exact (pr2 x).
Qed.

End filtergenerated.

L (pr1 Ha m)

      apply (pr1 (pr2 Ha)).
Qed.

∏ (L : (X → hProp) → hProp)

      → ∃ x : X, finite_intersection L' x),
(∏ A : X → hProp, L A → FilterGenerated L Hl A)
× (∏ F : Filter X,
   (∏ A : X → hProp, L A → F A)
   → filter_le F (FilterGenerated L Hl))

 → ∃ B : X → hProp,
   F B
   × (∏ x0 : X,
      A x0 ∧ B x0 → A x0 ∧ finite_intersection x x0))

       A x0 ∧ B x0
       → A x0 ∧ finite_intersection (append x y) x0)

H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
Hl: ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A
F (λ _ : X, htrue)
 exact (filter_htrue F).
          
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
Hl: ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A
∏ x : X, A x ∧ htrue → A x ∧ htrue
 intros; assumption.
        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
∏ (x : Sequence (X → hProp)) (y : X → hProp),
((∏ m : (⟦ length x ⟧)%stn, F (x m) ∨ x m = A)
 → ∃ B : X → hProp,
   F B
   × (∏ x0 : X,
      A x0 ∧ B x0 → A x0 ∧ finite_intersection x x0))
→ (∏ m : (⟦ length (append x y) ⟧)%stn,
   F (append x y m) ∨ append x y m = A)
  → ∃ B : X → hProp,
    F B
    × (∏ x0 : X,
       A x0 ∧ B x0
       → A x0 ∧ finite_intersection (append x y) x0)
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
B: X → hProp
IHl: (∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L m) ∨ L m = A)
→ ∃ B : X → hProp, F B × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x)
Hl: ∏ m : (⟦ length (append L B) ⟧)%stn,
F (append L B m) ∨ append L B m = A
∃ B0 : X → hProp,
F B0
× (∏ x : X,
   A x ∧ B0 x
   → A x ∧ finite_intersection (append L B) x)

F (append L B m) ∨ append L B m = A
∃ B0 : X → hProp,
F B0
× (∏ x : X,
   A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ B x ∧ finite_intersection L x)

F (append L B m) ∨ append L B m = A
?X
→ ∃ B0 : X → hProp,

  × (∏ x : X,

A: X → hProp

F B
× (∏ x : X,
   A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x)
ishinh_UU
  (pr1 F (append_vec (pr2 L) B lastelement)
   ⨿ (append_vec (pr2 L) B lastelement = A))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
     pr1 F B0
     × (∏ x : X,
        A x × B0 x
        → A x
          × B x × (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, L n x)))

F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x

→ ∃ B : X → hProp, F B × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x)

F (append L B m) ∨ append L B m = A
C: ∑ B : X → hProp,
F B
× (∏ x : X,
   A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x)
ishinh_UU (pr1 F B ⨿ (B = A))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
     pr1 F B0
     × (∏ x : X,
        A x × B0 x
        → A x
          × B x × (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, L n x)))

F B

pr1 F B ⨿ (B = A)

 exact (pr1 H0).
                 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
B: X → hProp
IHl: (∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L m) ∨ L m = A)
→ ∃ B : X → hProp, F B × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x)
Hl: ∏ m : (⟦ length (append L B) ⟧)%stn,
F (append L B m) ∨ append L B m = A
C: ∑ B : X → hProp,
F B
× (∏ x : X,
   A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x)
Fl: pr1 F B
x: X
H0: A x × (λ x : X, pr1 C x ∧ B x) x
B x
 exact (pr2 (pr2 H0)).
