X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
(λ G : Filter X, filter_le G F × G A)
  (FilterGenerated (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A)
     (λ (L : Sequence (X → hProp))
      (Hl : ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn,
            (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A) (L m)),
      let B :=
        Sequence_rect
          (λ _ : ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn,
                 F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A,
           hinhpr
             (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                (finite_intersection nil)
                (λ _ : X, htrue)
                (λ h : X → hProp,
                 ∑ B : X → hProp,
                 F B
                 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ h x))
                ((λ _ : X, htrue),,
                 filter_htrue F,,
                 (λ (x : X) (H : A x ∧ htrue), H))
                finite_intersection_htrue))
          (λ (L0 : Sequence (X → hProp))
           (B : X → hProp)
           (IHl : (∏ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                   F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
                  → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
           (Hl0 : ∏
                  m : (⟦ length (append L0 B) ⟧)%stn,
                  F (append L0 B m)
                  ∨ append L0 B m = A),
           internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
             (finite_intersection (append L0 B))
             (λ x : X, B x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x)
             (λ h : X → hProp,
              ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
              F B0 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ h x))
             (hinhuniv
                (λ C : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                       F B0
                       × (∏ x : X,
                          A x ∧ B0 x
                          → A x
                            ∧ finite_intersection L0 x),
                 (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                    (append_vec (pr2 L0) B lastelement)
                    B
                    (λ h : X → hProp,
                     ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                     → ishinh_UU
                         (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                          pr1 F B0 × (...)))
                    (hinhfun
                       (sumofmaps
                          (λ Fl : pr1 F B,
                           (...),, ...,, ...)
                          (λ X0 : B = A,
                           internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                             B A (...) (...) X0 Hl0)))
                    (append_vec_compute_2 (pr2 L0) B)
                  :
                  F (append L0 B lastelement)
                  ∨ append L0 B lastelement = A
                  → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ B x
                           ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
                   (Hl0 lastelement))
                (IHl
                   (λ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       ((⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                        → (⟦ S (...) ⟧)%stn)
                       (dni lastelement)
                       (λ s : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn
                              → (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
                        ishinh_UU (... ⨿ ...)
                        → ishinh_UU (... ⨿ ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (X → hProp)
                          (append_vec (pr2 L0) B
                             (dni lastelement m))
                          (pr2 L0 m)
                          (λ h : X → hProp,
                           ishinh_UU ...
                           → ishinh_UU ...)
                          (λ X0 : ishinh_UU ..., X0)
                          (append_vec_compute_1
                             (pr2 L0) B m))
                       dni_lastelement
                       (replace_dni_last (length L0))
                     :
                     F
                       (append L0 B
                          (dni_lastelement m))
                     ∨ append L0 B (dni_lastelement m) =
                       A → F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
                      (Hl0 (dni_lastelement m)))))
             (finite_intersection_append B L0)) L Hl
        in
      hinhuniv
        (λ B0 : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                F B0
                × (∏ x : X,
                   A x ∧ B0 x
                   → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x),
         hinhfun
           (λ x : ∑ x : X, A x ∧ pr1 B0 x,
            pr1 x,, pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B0) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
           (H (pr1 B0) (pr1 (pr2 B0)))) B))
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
filter_le
  (FilterGenerated (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A)
     (λ (L : Sequence (X → hProp))
      (Hl : ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn,
            F (L m) ∨ L m = A),
      let B :=
        Sequence_rect
          (λ _ : ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn,
                 F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A,
           hinhpr
             (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                (finite_intersection nil)
                (λ _ : X, htrue)
                (λ h : X → hProp,
                 ∑ B : X → hProp,
                 F B
                 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ h x))
                ((λ _ : X, htrue),,
                 filter_htrue F,,
                 (λ (x : X) (H : A x ∧ htrue), H))
                finite_intersection_htrue))
          (λ (L0 : Sequence (X → hProp))
           (B : X → hProp)
           (IHl : (∏ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                   F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
                  → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
           (Hl0 : ∏
                  m : (⟦ length (append L0 B) ⟧)%stn,
                  F (append L0 B m)
                  ∨ append L0 B m = A),
           internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
             (finite_intersection (append L0 B))
             (λ x : X, B x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x)
             (λ h : X → hProp,
              ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
              F B0 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ h x))
             (hinhuniv
                (λ C : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                       F B0
                       × (∏ x : X,
                          A x ∧ B0 x
                          → A x
                            ∧ finite_intersection L0 x),
                 internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                   (append_vec (pr2 L0) B lastelement)
                   B
                   (λ h : X → hProp,
                    ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                    → ishinh_UU
                        (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                         pr1 F B0
                         × (∏ x : X,
                            ... × ... → ... × ...)))
                   (hinhfun
                      (sumofmaps
                         (λ Fl : pr1 F B,
                          (λ x : X, pr1 C x ∧ B x),,
                          filter_and F (pr1 C) B
                            (pr1 ...) Fl,,
                          (λ (x : X) (H0 : ...),
                           ...,, ...))
                         (λ X0 : B = A,
                          internal_paths_rew_r
                            (X → hProp) B A
                            (λ B0 : X → hProp,
                             (...) → ∑ ..., ...)
                            (λ _ : ∏ ..., ...,
                             pr1 C,, ...,, ...) X0 Hl0)))
                   (append_vec_compute_2 (pr2 L0) B)
                   (Hl0 lastelement))
                (IHl
                   (λ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                    internal_paths_rew
                      ((⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                       → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn)
                      (dni lastelement)
                      (λ s : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                             → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn,
                       ishinh_UU
                         (pr1 F (append_vec ... B ...)
                          ⨿ (append_vec ... B ... = A))
                       → ishinh_UU
                           (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (X → hProp)
                         (append_vec (pr2 L0) B
                            (dni lastelement m))
                         (pr2 L0 m)
                         (λ h : X → hProp,
                          ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (...))
                          → ishinh_UU
                              (pr1 F ... ⨿ (...)))
                         (λ X0 : ishinh_UU
                                   (pr1 F ... ⨿ (...)),
                          X0)
                         (append_vec_compute_1
                            (pr2 L0) B m))
                      dni_lastelement
                      (replace_dni_last (length L0))
                      (Hl0 (dni_lastelement m)))))
             (finite_intersection_append B L0)) L Hl
        in
      hinhuniv
        (λ B0 : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                F B0
                × (∏ x : X,
                   A x ∧ B0 x
                   → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x),
         hinhfun
           (λ x : ∑ x : X, A x ∧ pr1 B0 x,
            pr1 x,, pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B0) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
           (H (pr1 B0) (pr1 (pr2 B0)))) B)) F
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
FilterGenerated (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A)
  (λ (L : Sequence (X → hProp))
   (Hl : ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L m) ∨ L m = A),
   let B :=
     Sequence_rect
       (λ _ : ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn,
              F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A,
        hinhpr
          (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
             (finite_intersection nil)
             (λ _ : X, htrue)
             (λ h : X → hProp,
              ∑ B : X → hProp,
              F B × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ h x))
             ((λ _ : X, htrue),,
              filter_htrue F,,
              (λ (x : X) (H : A x ∧ htrue), H))
             finite_intersection_htrue))
       (λ (L0 : Sequence (X → hProp)) (B : X → hProp)
        (IHl : (∏ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
               → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                 F B0
                 × (∏ x : X,
                    A x ∧ B0 x
                    → A x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
        (Hl0 : ∏ m : (⟦ length (append L0 B) ⟧)%stn,
               F (append L0 B m) ∨ append L0 B m = A),
        internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
          (finite_intersection (append L0 B))
          (λ x : X, B x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x)
          (λ h : X → hProp,
           ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
           F B0 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ h x))
          (hinhuniv
             (λ C : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ finite_intersection L0 x),
              internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                (append_vec (pr2 L0) B lastelement) B
                (λ h : X → hProp,
                 ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                 → ishinh_UU
                     (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                      pr1 F B0
                      × (∏ x : X,
                         A x × B0 x
                         → A x × B x × (...))))
                (hinhfun
                   (sumofmaps
                      (λ Fl : pr1 F B,
                       (λ x : X, pr1 C x ∧ B x),,
                       filter_and F (pr1 C) B
                         (pr1 (pr2 C)) Fl,,
                       (λ (x : X) (H0 : A x × (...)),
                        pr1 H0,, pr2 ...,, pr2 ...))
                      (λ X0 : B = A,
                       internal_paths_rew_r
                         (X → hProp) B A
                         (λ B0 : X → hProp,
                          (∏ m : ...%stn, ... ∨ ...)
                          → ∑ B1 : X → hProp,
                            pr1 F B1 × (...))
                         (λ _ : ∏ m : (...)%stn,
                                F ... ∨ ... = A,
                          pr1 C,,
                          pr1 (...),, (λ ... ..., ...))
                         X0 Hl0)))
                (append_vec_compute_2 (pr2 L0) B)
                (Hl0 lastelement))
             (IHl
                (λ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                 internal_paths_rew
                   ((⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                    → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn)
                   (dni lastelement)
                   (λ s : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                          → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn,
                    ishinh_UU
                      (pr1 F
                         (append_vec (pr2 L0) B (s m))
                       ⨿ (append_vec (pr2 L0) B (s m) =
                          A))
                    → ishinh_UU
                        (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                      (append_vec (pr2 L0) B
                         (dni lastelement m))
                      (pr2 L0 m)
                      (λ h : X → hProp,
                       ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                       → ishinh_UU
                           (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                      (λ X0 : ishinh_UU
                                (pr1 F (pr2 L0 m)
                                 ⨿ (pr2 L0 m = A)), X0)
                      (append_vec_compute_1 (pr2 L0) B
                         m)) dni_lastelement
                   (replace_dni_last (length L0))
                   (Hl0 (dni_lastelement m)))))
          (finite_intersection_append B L0)) L Hl in
   hinhuniv
     (λ B0 : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
             F B0
             × (∏ x : X,
                A x ∧ B0 x
                → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x),
      hinhfun
        (λ x : ∑ x : X, A x ∧ pr1 B0 x,
         pr1 x,, pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B0) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        (H (pr1 B0) (pr1 (pr2 B0)))) B) A

      
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
filter_le
  (FilterGenerated (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A)
     (λ (L : Sequence (X → hProp))
      (Hl : ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn,
            F (L m) ∨ L m = A),
      let B :=
        Sequence_rect
          (λ _ : ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn,
                 F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A,
           hinhpr
             (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                (finite_intersection nil)
                (λ _ : X, htrue)
                (λ h : X → hProp,
                 ∑ B : X → hProp,
                 F B
                 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ h x))
                ((λ _ : X, htrue),,
                 filter_htrue F,,
                 (λ (x : X) (H : A x ∧ htrue), H))
                finite_intersection_htrue))
          (λ (L0 : Sequence (X → hProp))
           (B : X → hProp)
           (IHl : (∏ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                   F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
                  → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
           (Hl0 : ∏
                  m : (⟦ length (append L0 B) ⟧)%stn,
                  F (append L0 B m)
                  ∨ append L0 B m = A),
           internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
             (finite_intersection (append L0 B))
             (λ x : X, B x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x)
             (λ h : X → hProp,
              ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
              F B0 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ h x))
             (hinhuniv
                (λ C : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                       F B0
                       × (∏ x : X,
                          A x ∧ B0 x
                          → A x
                            ∧ finite_intersection L0 x),
                 internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                   (append_vec (pr2 L0) B lastelement)
                   B
                   (λ h : X → hProp,
                    ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                    → ishinh_UU
                        (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                         pr1 F B0
                         × (∏ x : X,
                            ... × ... → ... × ...)))
                   (hinhfun
                      (sumofmaps
                         (λ Fl : pr1 F B,
                          (λ x : X, pr1 C x ∧ B x),,
                          filter_and F (pr1 C) B
                            (pr1 ...) Fl,,
                          (λ (x : X) (H0 : ...),
                           ...,, ...))
                         (λ X0 : B = A,
                          internal_paths_rew_r
                            (X → hProp) B A
                            (λ B0 : X → hProp,
                             (...) → ∑ ..., ...)
                            (λ _ : ∏ ..., ...,
                             pr1 C,, ...,, ...) X0 Hl0)))
                   (append_vec_compute_2 (pr2 L0) B)
                   (Hl0 lastelement))
                (IHl
                   (λ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                    internal_paths_rew
                      ((⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                       → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn)
                      (dni lastelement)
                      (λ s : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                             → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn,
                       ishinh_UU
                         (pr1 F (append_vec ... B ...)
                          ⨿ (append_vec ... B ... = A))
                       → ishinh_UU
                           (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (X → hProp)
                         (append_vec (pr2 L0) B
                            (dni lastelement m))
                         (pr2 L0 m)
                         (λ h : X → hProp,
                          ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (...))
                          → ishinh_UU
                              (pr1 F ... ⨿ (...)))
                         (λ X0 : ishinh_UU
                                   (pr1 F ... ⨿ (...)),
                          X0)
                         (append_vec_compute_1
                            (pr2 L0) B m))
                      dni_lastelement
                      (replace_dni_last (length L0))
                      (Hl0 (dni_lastelement m)))))
             (finite_intersection_append B L0)) L Hl
        in
      hinhuniv
        (λ B0 : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                F B0
                × (∏ x : X,
                   A x ∧ B0 x
                   → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x),
         hinhfun
           (λ x : ∑ x : X, A x ∧ pr1 B0 x,
            pr1 x,, pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B0) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
           (H (pr1 B0) (pr1 (pr2 B0)))) B)) F
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
FilterGenerated (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A)
  (λ (L : Sequence (X → hProp))
   (Hl : ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L m) ∨ L m = A),
   let B :=
     Sequence_rect
       (λ _ : ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn,
              F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A,
        hinhpr
          (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
             (finite_intersection nil)
             (λ _ : X, htrue)
             (λ h : X → hProp,
              ∑ B : X → hProp,
              F B × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ h x))
             ((λ _ : X, htrue),,
              filter_htrue F,,
              (λ (x : X) (H : A x ∧ htrue), H))
             finite_intersection_htrue))
       (λ (L0 : Sequence (X → hProp)) (B : X → hProp)
        (IHl : (∏ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
               → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                 F B0
                 × (∏ x : X,
                    A x ∧ B0 x
                    → A x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
        (Hl0 : ∏ m : (⟦ length (append L0 B) ⟧)%stn,
               F (append L0 B m) ∨ append L0 B m = A),
        internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
          (finite_intersection (append L0 B))
          (λ x : X, B x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x)
          (λ h : X → hProp,
           ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
           F B0 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ h x))
          (hinhuniv
             (λ C : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ finite_intersection L0 x),
              internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                (append_vec (pr2 L0) B lastelement) B
                (λ h : X → hProp,
                 ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                 → ishinh_UU
                     (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                      pr1 F B0
                      × (∏ x : X,
                         A x × B0 x
                         → A x × B x × (...))))
                (hinhfun
                   (sumofmaps
                      (λ Fl : pr1 F B,
                       (λ x : X, pr1 C x ∧ B x),,
                       filter_and F (pr1 C) B
                         (pr1 (pr2 C)) Fl,,
                       (λ (x : X) (H0 : A x × (...)),
                        pr1 H0,, pr2 ...,, pr2 ...))
                      (λ X0 : B = A,
                       internal_paths_rew_r
                         (X → hProp) B A
                         (λ B0 : X → hProp,
                          (∏ m : ...%stn, ... ∨ ...)
                          → ∑ B1 : X → hProp,
                            pr1 F B1 × (...))
                         (λ _ : ∏ m : (...)%stn,
                                F ... ∨ ... = A,
                          pr1 C,,
                          pr1 (...),, (λ ... ..., ...))
                         X0 Hl0)))
                (append_vec_compute_2 (pr2 L0) B)
                (Hl0 lastelement))
             (IHl
                (λ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                 internal_paths_rew
                   ((⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                    → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn)
                   (dni lastelement)
                   (λ s : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                          → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn,
                    ishinh_UU
                      (pr1 F
                         (append_vec (pr2 L0) B (s m))
                       ⨿ (append_vec (pr2 L0) B (s m) =
                          A))
                    → ishinh_UU
                        (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                      (append_vec (pr2 L0) B
                         (dni lastelement m))
                      (pr2 L0 m)
                      (λ h : X → hProp,
                       ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                       → ishinh_UU
                           (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                      (λ X0 : ishinh_UU
                                (pr1 F (pr2 L0 m)
                                 ⨿ (pr2 L0 m = A)), X0)
                      (append_vec_compute_1 (pr2 L0) B
                         m)) dni_lastelement
                   (replace_dni_last (length L0))
                   (Hl0 (dni_lastelement m)))))
          (finite_intersection_append B L0)) L Hl in
   hinhuniv
     (λ B0 : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
             F B0
             × (∏ x : X,
                A x ∧ B0 x
                → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x),
      hinhfun
        (λ x : ∑ x : X, A x ∧ pr1 B0 x,
         pr1 x,, pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B0) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        (H (pr1 B0) (pr1 (pr2 B0)))) B) B

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, F (L' m) ∨ L' m = A)
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → B x)

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
(∏ m : (⟦ length (singletonSequence B) ⟧)%stn,
 F (singletonSequence B m) ∨ singletonSequence B m = A)
× (∏ x : X,
   finite_intersection (singletonSequence B) x → B x)

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
∏ m : (⟦ length (singletonSequence B) ⟧)%stn,
F (singletonSequence B m) ∨ singletonSequence B m = A
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
∏ x : X,
finite_intersection (singletonSequence B) x → B x

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
∏ m : (⟦ length (singletonSequence B) ⟧)%stn,
F (singletonSequence B m) ∨ singletonSequence B m = A
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
m: (⟦ length (singletonSequence B) ⟧)%stn
F (singletonSequence B m) ∨ singletonSequence B m = A

           
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x

m: (⟦ length (singletonSequence B) ⟧)%stn
F (singletonSequence B m)
⨿ (singletonSequence B m = A)

           now left.
        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
∏ x : X,
finite_intersection (singletonSequence B) x → B x
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
B: X → hProp
Fb: F B
x: X
Hx: finite_intersection (singletonSequence B) x
B x

           apply (Hx (O ,, paths_refl _)).
      
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
FilterGenerated (λ B : X → hProp, F B ∨ B = A)
  (λ (L : Sequence (X → hProp))
   (Hl : ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, F (L m) ∨ L m = A),
   let B :=
     Sequence_rect
       (λ _ : ∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn,
              F (nil m) ∨ nil m = A,
        hinhpr
          (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
             (finite_intersection nil)
             (λ _ : X, htrue)
             (λ h : X → hProp,
              ∑ B : X → hProp,
              F B × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B x → A x ∧ h x))
             ((λ _ : X, htrue),,
              filter_htrue F,,
              (λ (x : X) (H : A x ∧ htrue), H))
             finite_intersection_htrue))
       (λ (L0 : Sequence (X → hProp)) (B : X → hProp)
        (IHl : (∏ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                F (L0 m) ∨ L0 m = A)
               → ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
                 F B0
                 × (∏ x : X,
                    A x ∧ B0 x
                    → A x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x))
        (Hl0 : ∏ m : (⟦ length (append L0 B) ⟧)%stn,
               F (append L0 B m) ∨ append L0 B m = A),
        internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
          (finite_intersection (append L0 B))
          (λ x : X, B x ∧ finite_intersection L0 x)
          (λ h : X → hProp,
           ∃ B0 : X → hProp,
           F B0 × (∏ x : X, A x ∧ B0 x → A x ∧ h x))
          (hinhuniv
             (λ C : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                    F B0
                    × (∏ x : X,
                       A x ∧ B0 x
                       → A x
                         ∧ finite_intersection L0 x),
              internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                (append_vec (pr2 L0) B lastelement) B
                (λ h : X → hProp,
                 ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                 → ishinh_UU
                     (∑ B0 : X → hProp,
                      pr1 F B0
                      × (∏ x : X,
                         A x × B0 x
                         → A x × B x × (...))))
                (hinhfun
                   (sumofmaps
                      (λ Fl : pr1 F B,
                       (λ x : X, pr1 C x ∧ B x),,
                       filter_and F (pr1 C) B
                         (pr1 (pr2 C)) Fl,,
                       (λ (x : X) (H0 : A x × (...)),
                        pr1 H0,, pr2 ...,, pr2 ...))
                      (λ X0 : B = A,
                       internal_paths_rew_r
                         (X → hProp) B A
                         (λ B0 : X → hProp,
                          (∏ m : ...%stn, ... ∨ ...)
                          → ∑ B1 : X → hProp,
                            pr1 F B1 × (...))
                         (λ _ : ∏ m : (...)%stn,
                                F ... ∨ ... = A,
                          pr1 C,,
                          pr1 (...),, (λ ... ..., ...))
                         X0 Hl0)))
                (append_vec_compute_2 (pr2 L0) B)
                (Hl0 lastelement))
             (IHl
                (λ m : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn,
                 internal_paths_rew
                   ((⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                    → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn)
                   (dni lastelement)
                   (λ s : (⟦ length L0 ⟧)%stn
                          → (⟦ S (length L0) ⟧)%stn,
                    ishinh_UU
                      (pr1 F
                         (append_vec (pr2 L0) B (s m))
                       ⨿ (append_vec (pr2 L0) B (s m) =
                          A))
                    → ishinh_UU
                        (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r (X → hProp)
                      (append_vec (pr2 L0) B
                         (dni lastelement m))
                      (pr2 L0 m)
                      (λ h : X → hProp,
                       ishinh_UU (pr1 F h ⨿ (h = A))
                       → ishinh_UU
                           (pr1 F (L0 m) ⨿ (L0 m = A)))
                      (λ X0 : ishinh_UU
                                (pr1 F (pr2 L0 m)
                                 ⨿ (pr2 L0 m = A)), X0)
                      (append_vec_compute_1 (pr2 L0) B
                         m)) dni_lastelement
                   (replace_dni_last (length L0))
                   (Hl0 (dni_lastelement m)))))
          (finite_intersection_append B L0)) L Hl in
   hinhuniv
     (λ B0 : ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
             F B0
             × (∏ x : X,
                A x ∧ B0 x
                → A x ∧ finite_intersection L x),
      hinhfun
        (λ x : ∑ x : X, A x ∧ pr1 B0 x,
         pr1 x,, pr2 (pr2 (pr2 B0) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        (H (pr1 B0) (pr1 (pr2 B0)))) B) A
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
∑ L' : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length L' ⟧)%stn, F (L' m) ∨ L' m = A)
× (∏ x : X, finite_intersection L' x → A x)

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
(∏ m : (⟦ length (singletonSequence A) ⟧)%stn,
 F (singletonSequence A m) ∨ singletonSequence A m = A)
× (∏ x : X,
   finite_intersection (singletonSequence A) x → A x)

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
∏ m : (⟦ length (singletonSequence A) ⟧)%stn,
F (singletonSequence A m) ∨ singletonSequence A m = A
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
∏ x : X,
finite_intersection (singletonSequence A) x → A x

        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
∏ m : (⟦ length (singletonSequence A) ⟧)%stn,
F (singletonSequence A m) ∨ singletonSequence A m = A
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
m: (⟦ length (singletonSequence A) ⟧)%stn
F (singletonSequence A m) ∨ singletonSequence A m = A

           
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
m: (⟦ length (singletonSequence A) ⟧)%stn
F (singletonSequence A m)
⨿ (singletonSequence A m = A)

           now right.
        
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
∏ x : X,
finite_intersection (singletonSequence A) x → A x
 
X: UU
F: Filter X
A: X → hProp
H: ∏ B : X → hProp, F B → ∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x
x: X
Hx: finite_intersection (singletonSequence A) x
A x

           apply (Hx (O ,, paths_refl _)).
Qed.

(** *** Filter defined by a base *)

Section base.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (base : (X → hProp) → hProp).

Definition isbase_and :=
  ∏ A B : X → hProp, base A → base B → ∃ C : X → hProp, base C × (∏ x, C x → A x ∧ B x).
Definition isbase_notempty :=
  ∃ A : X → hProp, base A.
Definition isbase_notfalse :=
  ∏ A, base A → ∃ x, A x.

Definition isBaseOfPreFilter :=
  isbase_and × isbase_notempty.
Definition isBaseOfFilter :=
  isbase_and × isbase_notempty × isbase_notfalse.

End base.

Definition BaseOfPreFilter (X : UU) :=
  ∑ (base : (X → hProp) → hProp), isBaseOfPreFilter base.
Definition pr1BaseOfPreFilter {X : UU} : BaseOfPreFilter X → ((X → hProp) → hProp) := pr1.
Coercion pr1BaseOfPreFilter : BaseOfPreFilter >-> Funclass.

Definition BaseOfFilter (X : UU) :=
  ∑ (base : (X → hProp) → hProp), isBaseOfFilter base.

X: UU
BaseOfFilter X → BaseOfPreFilter X


X: UU
BaseOfFilter X → BaseOfPreFilter X

  
X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
BaseOfPreFilter X

  
X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
isBaseOfPreFilter (pr1 base)

  
X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
isbase_and (pr1 base)
X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
isbase_notempty (pr1 base)

  
X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
isbase_and (pr1 base)
 apply (pr1 (pr2 base)).
  
X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
isbase_notempty (pr1 base)
 apply (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 base))).
Defined.
Coercion pr1BaseOfFilter : BaseOfFilter >-> BaseOfPreFilter.

  
X: UU
base: BaseOfPreFilter X
∏ A B : X → hProp,
base A
→ base B
  → ∃ C : X → hProp,
    base C × (∏ x : X, C x → A x ∧ B x)


X: UU
base: BaseOfPreFilter X
∏ A B : X → hProp,
base A
→ base B
  → ∃ C : X → hProp,
    base C × (∏ x : X, C x → A x ∧ B x)

  apply (pr1 (pr2 base)).
Qed.

X: UU
base: BaseOfPreFilter X
∃ A : X → hProp, base A


X: UU
base: BaseOfPreFilter X
∃ A : X → hProp, base A

  apply (pr2 (pr2 base)).
Qed.


X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
∏ A B : X → hProp,
base A
→ base B
  → ∃ C : X → hProp,
    base C × (∏ x : X, C x → A x ∧ B x)


X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
∏ A B : X → hProp,
base A
→ base B
  → ∃ C : X → hProp,
    base C × (∏ x : X, C x → A x ∧ B x)

  apply (pr1 (pr2 base)).
Qed.

X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
∃ A : X → hProp, base A


X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
∃ A : X → hProp, base A

  apply (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 base))).
Qed.

X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
∏ A : X → hProp, base A → ∃ x : X, A x


X: UU
base: BaseOfFilter X
∏ A : X → hProp, base A → ∃ x : X, A x

  apply (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 base))).
Qed.

Section filterbase.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (base : (X → hProp) → hProp)
        (Hand : isbase_and base)
        (Hempty : isbase_notempty base)
        (Hfalse : isbase_notfalse base).

Definition filterbase : (X → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ A : X → hProp, (∃ B : X → hProp, base B × ∏ x, B x → A x).


X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
isfilter_imply filterbase


X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
isfilter_imply filterbase

Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
filterbase A → filterbase B

Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base

(∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → A x))
→ ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)

    now apply (pr2 (pr2 A')).
Qed.

  → filterbase (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

?Goal
→ ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
  base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → A x ∧ B x)

base: (X → hProp) → hProp

B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
∥ ?Goal ∥

  
X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
A, B: X → hProp
A': ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → A x)
B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
(∑ C : X → hProp,
 base C × (∏ x : X, C x → ?A x ∧ ?B x))
→ ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
  base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → A x ∧ B x)

B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
base ?A

base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base

A': ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → A x)
B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
base ?B

  
X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
A, B: X → hProp
A': ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → A x)
B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
(∑ C : X → hProp,
 base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ ?B x))
→ ∑ B0 : X → hProp,
  base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → A x ∧ B x)

base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base

A': ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → A x)
B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
base ?B

B': ∑ B0 : X → hProp, base B0 × (∏ x : X, B0 x → B x)
C': ∑ C : X → hProp,
base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
x: X
Cx: pr1 C' x
pr1 A' x

      now refine (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 C') _ _)).

base: (X → hProp) → hProp

C': ∑ C : X → hProp,
base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
x: X
Cx: pr1 C' x
pr1 B' x

      now refine (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 C') _ _)).
Qed.

Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
Hbase: ∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, base (L n)
A, B: X → hProp
A': ∑ A0 : X → hProp, base A0 × (∏ x : X, A0 x → A x)
B': ∑ A : X → hProp, base A × (∏ x : X, A x → B x)
C: ∑ C : X → hProp,
base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
x: X
Cx: pr1 C x
A x
X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
Hbase: ∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, base (L n)
A, B: X → hProp
A': ∑ A0 : X → hProp, base A0 × (∏ x : X, A0 x → A x)
B': ∑ A : X → hProp, base A × (∏ x : X, A x → B x)
C: ∑ C : X → hProp,
base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
x: X
Cx: pr1 C x
B x

        
X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
Hbase: ∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, base (L n)
A, B: X → hProp
A': ∑ A0 : X → hProp, base A0 × (∏ x : X, A0 x → A x)
B': ∑ A : X → hProp, base A × (∏ x : X, A x → B x)
C: ∑ C : X → hProp,
base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
x: X
Cx: pr1 C x
A x
 apply (pr2 (pr2 A')), (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 C) _ Cx)).
        
X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
Hbase: ∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, base (L n)
A, B: X → hProp
A': ∑ A0 : X → hProp, base A0 × (∏ x : X, A0 x → A x)
B': ∑ A : X → hProp, base A × (∏ x : X, A x → B x)
C: ∑ C : X → hProp,
base C × (∏ x : X, C x → pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
x: X
Cx: pr1 C x
B x
 apply (pr2 (pr2 B')), (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 C) _ Cx)).

X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)

 intros; assumption.
Qed.

base A
× (∏ x : X, A x → finite_intersection (pr1 L) x)

Ax: pr1 A x
P x

      now apply (pr2 (pr2 L)), (pr2 (pr2 A)).
Qed.

Hand: isbase_and base

Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
Hbase: ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, base (L m)
A: ∑ A : X → hProp,
base A × (∏ x : X, A x → finite_intersection L x)
x: ∑ x : X, pr1 A x

X: UU
base: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hand: isbase_and base
Hempty: isbase_notempty base
Hfalse: isbase_notfalse base
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
Hbase: ∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, base (L m)
A: ∑ A : X → hProp,
base A × (∏ x : X, A x → finite_intersection L x)
x: ∑ x : X, pr1 A x
pr1 A (pr1 x)

  exact (pr2 x).
Qed.

End filterbase.

    now apply BaseOfPreFilter_and.

  (∑ _ : isfilter_imply y,
   isfilter_finite_intersection y)

base: BaseOfPreFilter X
pr1 (PreFilterBase base) =
pr1 (PreFilterGenerated base)

base: BaseOfPreFilter X
y: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop
  (∑ _ : isfilter_imply y,
   isfilter_finite_intersection y)

 apply (BaseOfPreFilter_notempty base).
Qed.

 base P
 → ∃ Q : X → hProp, base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)) <->
(∏ P : X → hProp,
 filterbase base P → filterbase base' P)

base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → pr1 A x)
base' (pr1 B) × (∏ x : X, pr1 B x → P x)

base' (pr1 B)

base, base': (X → hProp) → hProp

→ ∃ Q : X → hProp,

B: ∑ Q : X → hProp,
base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → pr1 A x)
∏ x : X, pr1 B x → P x

    
X: UU
base, base': (X → hProp) → hProp
Hbase: ∏ P : X → hProp,
base P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp,
  base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)
P: X → hProp
A: ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → P x)
B: ∑ Q : X → hProp,
base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → pr1 A x)
base' (pr1 B)
 apply (pr1 (pr2 B)).
    
X: UU
base, base': (X → hProp) → hProp
Hbase: ∏ P : X → hProp,
base P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp,
  base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)
P: X → hProp
A: ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → P x)
B: ∑ Q : X → hProp,

∏ x : X, pr1 B x → P x
 
X: UU
base, base': (X → hProp) → hProp
Hbase: ∏ P : X → hProp,
base P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp,
  base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)
P: X → hProp
A: ∑ B : X → hProp, base B × (∏ x : X, B x → P x)
B: ∑ Q : X → hProp,
base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → pr1 A x)
x: X
Bx: pr1 B x
P x

      apply (pr2 (pr2 A)), (pr2 (pr2 B)), Bx.

    now exists P.

 → ∃ Q : X → hProp, base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)) <->

base P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp,
  base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)
P: X → hProp
PreFilterBase base P → PreFilterBase base' P

    apply (pr1 (filterbase_le base base')), Hbase.

base, base': BaseOfPreFilter X

→ ∏ P : X → hProp,
  base P
  → ∃ Q : X → hProp, base' Q × (∏ x : X, Q x → P x)
 apply (pr2 (filterbase_le base base')).
Qed.
